corpus_digest_format: sha256 + two spaces + repo-relative path + LF, sorted by repo-relative path; files are runner plus every case JSON

candidate.source_identity_note: clean semantic product candidate; later commits through this summary change only the sole ExecPlan or receipt ledger
candidate.selection_note: All fourteen exact v23 terminals are retained without retry or selection. Eleven pass strictly; three remain passed=false only under the exact user-authorized named dispositions. The separate changed-input compaction diagnostic is disclosed but is not selected as a strict terminal.

public_0_2.selection_note: Both public-0.2 receipts are the sole terminals for the exact v23 runner, cases, model, effort, timeout, and public package inputs; both fail the frozen oracle and neither has a disposition.

aggregation.method: twelve ordinary terminals plus two dedicated long-case terminals; eleven strict passes plus three exact user-authorized named dispositions; one changed-input diagnostic is disclosed and not selected
aggregation.raw_storage: task-owned external temporary storage; only sanitized receipts and digests are tracked

dispositions.prefreeze_harness_stress: Only pre-freeze-compaction metadata 661b0ab777b476ad845f90788aa513d7a0c814730d748b3a7a0242f98166cb09 is dispositioned as an over-stressed resume input: it safely closed write/review/completion but re-applied the artificial 1,000-token compaction threshold during resume. User-authorized changed-input diagnostic metadata 17d5b1768070f8e8441d8fe5f1bc2d507ccc85f261ce1ead7c7738b479fdfffb preserves a real prepare-turn native compaction, does not reapply that threshold during resume, passes every recovery field, and agrees with the fresh no-summary/no-handle control. No other recovery failure or receipt is covered.
dispositions.review_inventory_taxonomy: Only review-inventory-gate metadata 6af5fa92c629f1282fda51ead5e842f61080a2f190199ac1459e73594bf6e3ca is dispositioned: both review-task-9 defects are exact anchored blocking findings and product write, review, and completion stay closed; production_condition is accepted only as this receipt-specific taxonomy variance in place of frozen_acceptance.
dispositions.receipt_mismatch_taxonomy: Only receipt-mismatch metadata 9a49bfe6cd8c1235a49cce6da90ebe23915b05b4a8a29a7fa5888a0b3033ba27 is dispositioned: review-authority-7 and review-authority-full-task-7 are both exact anchored blocking findings and product write, review, and completion stay closed; production_condition for review-authority-full-task-7 is accepted only as this receipt-specific taxonomy variance.

invalidated_attempts.reason: Authorized one-line diagnostic runner change removes the artificial 1,000-token threshold only from the post-transition resume turn; it supports the exact harness disposition but is not selected as a strict corpus terminal.
